market_analysis.market_gap: No tool currently performs pre-deployment static analysis specifically for AI agent memory security (vector store tenant isolation, memory leakage detection, embedding security)
market_analysis.agentwall_unique_capability: Pre-deploy static AST-based analysis of agent memory & permission configuration

tools.name: Snyk Code
tools.focus: AI-generated code supply chain, taint analysis from LLM libraries to outputs
tools.gap: No agent-level memory or tool permission analysis

tools.name: Semgrep
tools.focus: AST pattern matching with AI-powered noise filtering (Semgrep Memories)
tools.gap: Generic code scanning; no agent-specific security rules

tools.name: CodeQL
tools.focus: Semantic code analysis, LLM-assisted API modeling to reduce false negatives
tools.gap: LLM/AI framework context not included

tools.name: SonarQube
tools.focus: 35+ language analysis, AI CodeFix auto-generation, AI-generated code detection
tools.gap: AI code quality, not agent security; no memory isolation audit

tools.name: Checkmarx
tools.focus: SAST + SCA hybrid, Developer Assist in IDE, LLM security (insecure deserialization, pickle gadgets)
tools.gap: Code-level LLM security; no agent-level memory or tool audit

tools.name: Lakera Guard
tools.focus: Prompt injection detection (instruction overrides, jailbreaks, indirect injections), learns from 100K+ attacks daily
tools.gap: Input/output filtering only; no memory isolation audit or code analysis

tools.name: Promptfoo
tools.focus: Behavioral red-teaming, tests 50+ vulnerability types (injection, jailbreaks, data leaks, tool misuse), 300K users
tools.gap: Behavioral testing against live agents; not static code analysis

tools.name: Garak (NVIDIA/OWASP)
tools.focus: LLM vulnerability scanner, probes for hallucination/leakage/injection, mapped to OWASP Top 10 LLM
tools.gap: Model-level testing; not agent architecture or memory system audit

tools.name: Giskard
tools.focus: Black-box testing for hallucinations, bias, harmful content, data leakage; EU AI Act compliance
tools.gap: Requires live API endpoint; black-box testing, not static code analysis

tools.name: Rebuff
tools.focus: 4-layer prompt injection defense: heuristics, LLM detection, VectorDB embeddings, canary tokens
tools.gap: Injection detection only; no memory architecture or permission audit

tools.name: LLM Guard (Protect AI)
tools.focus: 15 input + 20 output scanners (PII, toxicity, secrets, injection, URLs, bias, consistency, leakage)
tools.gap: Inference-time filtering; no pre-deploy static analysis of agent code

tools.name: LangSmith
tools.focus: LangChain observability, multi-tenant isolation via project scoping, automated evals for injection/jailbreak
tools.gap: Runtime observability only; no pre-deploy static analysis

tools.name: Arize
tools.focus: Decision-level visibility into agent state, trace inspection, embedding drift, on-premise for data isolation
tools.gap: Production observability; no pre-deploy code audit

tools.name: Helicone
tools.focus: LLMOps observability, built-in prompt injection detection (Meta's Llama Guard + Prompt Guard), self-hosting
tools.gap: Runtime security checks; no pre-deploy memory architecture audit

tools.name: Langfuse
tools.focus: Open-source LLM engineering platform, tracing + prompt management + evals, can integrate LLM Guard, ISO27001/SOC2
tools.gap: Runtime integration; no pre-deploy static code analysis

tools.name: Noma Security
tools.focus: AI-SPM (Security Posture Management), real-time monitoring, policy enforcement, SOC2/ISO27001/EU AI Act compliance, $100M funding (March 2026)
tools.gap: Enterprise governance layer; no pre-deploy memory security scanning

tools.name: Galileo Agent Control
tools.focus: Open-source agent policy plane (Apache 2.0), define policies once deploy anywhere, runtime mitigation, integrates LangGraph/CrewAI/Glean
tools.gap: Policy enforcement/governance; no static code analysis

tools.name: Operant AI Agent Protector
tools.focus: Real-time agentic security (Feb 2026), shadow agent discovery, observability, inline threat detection, zero-trust, LangGraph/CrewAI/n8n integration
tools.gap: Runtime threat detection; no pre-deploy static audit

tools.name: Zenity
tools.focus: Runtime monitoring for prompt injection, data leaks, over-permissioning, ISO/IEC 27701 (PII), GDPR/CCPA compliance, Gartner Cool Vendor 2025
tools.gap: Runtime compliance; no pre-deploy code analysis

tools.name: Credo AI
tools.focus: Responsible AI governance, Policy Intelligence Engine, AI Registry for tracking deployments, category-defining leader
tools.gap: Policy governance; no memory/permission security scanning

tools.name: Holistic AI
tools.focus: End-to-end AI governance, discovers systems, tests for security/bias/hallucinations/toxicity/privacy, compliance proof generation
tools.gap: Governance framework; no code-level security audit

tools.name: Guardrails AI
tools.focus: Python framework for Input/Output Guards, Guardrails Hub validators, deployable as Flask API or library
tools.gap: Output validation; no memory isolation or permission audit

tools.name: NVIDIA NeMo Guardrails
tools.focus: Programmable guardrails for LLM conversations, 5 types of rails (input/dialog/retrieval/output/message), GPU-accelerated, content safety + RAG grounding
tools.gap: Inference-time safety; no pre-deploy agent code audit

tools.name: OWASP Agent Memory Guard
tools.focus: Part of OWASP Top 10 Agentic 2026, provides memory poisoning mitigations: data validation, isolation, expiration, audit, cryptographic integrity checks
tools.gap: Manual audit checklist ONLY; no automated scanning, no CI/CD integration, no AST analysis

agentwall.name: AgentWall
agentwall.category: Pre-Deploy Static Analysis for Agent Memory & Permission Security
unique_capabilities: AST-based memory audit without running code
Flags metadata mismatch at insert vs. retrieval (AW-MEM-002)
Catches injection patterns in memory paths (AW-MEM-004)
Zero-dependency by default, fully offline, fail-safe design
target_customers: Solo AI engineers shipping side projects
Seed/Series A startups with multi-tenant agents
Teams without $50K+ budget for enterprise platforms

pipeline_positioning.full_stack: Development → Build → AgentWall (pre-deploy static scan) → Galileo/Operant (runtime enforcement) → Noma/Zenity (audit/forensics)
pipeline_positioning.agentwall_advantage: Only tool that automatically audits agent memory configuration and tool permissions before code reaches production
